title: Same time next week? 😭💔 Between 5 dogs, I swear I basically have a re...
description: Same time next week? 😭💔 Between 5 dogs, I swear I basically have a reserved parking spot at the vet. Shelly was just in for her annual shots and another ear infection. Not every week, but between the diarrhea saga, the last ear infection, and now this… it’s been a lot lately. Hopefully NOT same time next week🤞 #rescuedog #chihuahua #seniordog​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
